summary.key_theme: 公司近期完成 4 拆 1 股票分割，並持續受惠於 AI 安全需求增長與強勁的市場技術動能。

bullish.title: CrowdStrike Begins Split-Adjusted Trading Following 4-for-1 Stock Split
bullish.reason: 完成 4 拆 1 股票分割，降低了投資門檻，通常被市場視為對未來股價表現有信心的正面訊號。

bullish.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike both have best quarter ever as AI threats bolster cyber demand
bullish.reason: AI 威脅增加推動了對身分安全與網路安全的需求，CrowdStrike 業績表現處於歷史高點。

bullish.title: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Launches Unified AI Security Platform And Expands AWS Coalition
bullish.reason: 推出統一的 AI 安全控制平面並擴大與 AWS 的合作，強化了其在雲端安全領域的競爭護城河。

bullish.title: CrowdStrike Named Frost & Sullivan’s 2026 Global Enabling Technology Leader in Zero Trust Browser Security
bullish.reason: 獲得 Frost & Sullivan 認證為零信任瀏覽器安全領域的全球技術領導者，提升了品牌市場影響力。

bullish.title: Chinese AI Is Closing in on U.S. Rivals. That’s Good News for CrowdStrike and These 3 Stocks.
bullish.reason: 分析指出中國 AI 的發展反而會增加企業對 CrowdStrike 等網路安全防禦工具的需求。

bearish.title: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Stock May Be Fully Priced After Its 439% Run
bearish.reason: 股價在過去幾年已大幅上漲 439%，市場擔憂估值已過高，短期內可能面臨回調壓力。

bearish.title: Arete Downgrades CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) Rating to Neutral From Buy
bearish.reason: Arete 將評級從買入下調至中性，反映出部分機構對其短期成長動能的保守看法。

neutral.title: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱門股的資訊彙整，未提供具體的買賣建議或重大基本面變動。

neutral.title: Apple, Rivian, Tesla, CrowdStrike And SanDisk: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
neutral.reason: 僅列出當日受投資人關注的熱門股票，屬於市場情緒觀察，無實質利多或利空影響。
